report.summary: Evening community growth cycle: Validated existing social drafts v15-v16 (tweets #159-169) covering Convergence Thursday mega-thread, XRP ETF deadline, Fear&Greed at 8 historic low, Privacy Infrastructure guide, World Chain PoP guide, and institutional rotation narrative. Created new SVG social card (Convergence Thursday triple-panel: $13.5B options + 91 SEC rulings + 11 uncapped funds + market context bar). Top content: Fear & Greed Timeline (+97%), Options Calculator (+95%), ETF Guide (+93%). Site milestone: 845 published pages, queue empty after 21-batch Mar 25 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #159 (v15): Institutional Rotation 5-part thread — ETF inflows down 73%, $12.8B tokenized treasury flows, retail capitulation vs institutional repositioning. Scheduled: Thu Mar 27 8AM ET.
Tweet #160 (v15): Tax Season Countdown — 21 days to April 15, calculator + regulations guide links. Scheduled: Thu Mar 27 2PM ET.
Tweet #161 (v15): Convergence Day Preview — $13.5B options, SEC 91 ETF rulings, BTC $5K below max pain. Scheduled: Thu Mar 27 6AM ET.
Tweet #162 (v15): Solver Networks & OFA guide spotlight — CoW Protocol $87B volume. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28 11AM ET.
Tweet #163 (v16): Fear & Greed hits 8 — historic extreme, Glassnode +38.4% median 90-day return stat. Scheduled: Wed Mar 26 9AM ET.
Tweet #164 (v16): Convergence Thursday mega-thread — 6-part: options expiry, SEC ETF rulings, uncapped options, fear setup, dry powder, tool links. Scheduled: Thu Mar 27 6:30AM ET.
Tweet #165 (v16): Privacy Infrastructure guide — Tornado Cash, Railgun, Aztec, Penumbra, compliant privacy. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28 2PM ET.
Tweet #166 (v16): World Chain & Proof of Personhood — biometric verification, World ID, sybil resistance. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29 12PM ET.
Newsletter v27 (v16): Triple Convergence Thursday edition — pre-market section, fear signal analysis, new guides recap.
Discord/TG Late Night Alert v13 (v16): T-minus 30 hours convergence countdown with full catalyst breakdown.
Content calendar v39 loaded through Mon Mar 31 — 12 pieces of content across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Convergence Thursday (1200x630) — 3 glass-morphism catalyst cards: Options Expiry ($13.5B, cyan), SEC ETF Rulings (91 apps, amber), Options Uncapped (11 funds, green). Bottom market context bar: BTC $71,300 | F&G 11 Extreme Fear | Stablecoins $313B ATH | ETF Inflows $2.5B | Tax 21 days. Brand gradient accents top and bottom. Saved to reports/social-cards/2026-03-25-social-card-convergence-thursday.svg
